product_description: For recruiters building a pipeline and engaging with top talent.
crisis_comment: The market is tough right now. Keep your head up, your skills are definitely valuable.
anti_patterns: Don't ask them to DM immediately

voice_seeds.text: Huge congratulations on this milestone! It's always great to see hard work pay off in this industry.
Your portfolio looks incredibly strong. The right team will be very lucky to have your expertise.
